description:
'''Jerk''' is an [[Internet rap|Internet]] [[microgenre]] of [[hip-hop]] that emerged in [[New York City]] during the early 2020s, drawing inspiration from the original wave of [[jerk rap]], known as [[jerkin']] in the street dance culture, which initially gained popularity in the early 2010s.

The style had been originally pioneered by [[Xaviersobased]] and his collective [[1c34]], along with Californian producer Kashpaint. Artists such as [[St47ic]] and [[Phreshboyswag]] would be members of 1c34. Other notable artists in the scene include [[Islurwhenitalk]], [[Nettspend]], [[Yhapojj]], [[Yuke (rapper)|Yuke]], [[Fakemink]], [[Maxon Margiela]], [[YT (rapper)|YT]] and [[EsDeeKid]].

The genre achieved particularly significant success within [[United Kingdom|the United Kingdom]], where it was heavily present in the [[UK underground rap|UK Underground scene]].
